title: Exponential dichotomy and $(L^p,L^q)$-admissibility
author_string: Trinh Viet Duoc, Nguyen Van Trong
abstract: We consider the notion of an exponential dichotomy with respect to a family of norms for an evolutionary family in a Banach space, and we characterize it by the admissibility of the pair $(L^p,L^q)$ for $p,q \in [1,\infty]$ with $p\ge q$. We then use this characterization to establish the robustness of an exponentially dichotomic evolutionary family with respect to a family of norms.
